# Docs

jsts-bootstrapped documentation lives here. Claude's router is [`../CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) — start there, drill into these files for detail.

| File | What | When to update |
|---|---|---|
| [architecture.md](./architecture.md) | System shape, stack, key components | When the stack or a component boundary changes |
| [prd.md](./prd.md) | Product requirements | When scope, users, or success metrics change |
| [decisions/](./decisions/) | Architecture Decision Records | Every irreversible technical choice |
| [research/](./research/) | Investigations, benchmarks, notes | Whenever a non-trivial question needed a spike |

Scratch notes and session memory live in [`../memory/`](../memory/). See that folder's README for what belongs there vs. here.
